title: Deleted trash files reappear in thunderbird

content: I've noticed a problem in which I delete emails in the Trash folder using the Empty Trash command. title: Trouble transferring email from a Windows 7 PC to a Windows 10 PC
creator: Chazmanium
content:
Hi!

I am trying to help my mom transfer her e-mail from TB installed on a Windows 7 PC to a Windows 10 PC.

I have exported her old e-mails from TB using the ImportExportNG add-on as an Inbox file with the folder structure preserved. However, when I try to import that same Inbox file into TB on the W10 machine, TB will not recognize that file and import it, no matter what settings I choose for the import.

Anyone have any idea what might be going wrong?

Thanks!

title: Can't get Thunderbird to change Authorization Method to OAuth2
creator: dotyr2
content: I have set up 2fa with my email provider (email is rdoty@gmx.com) and set an app-specific password for Thunderbird. Gmx also supports OAuth2. I have reset the passwords in Thunderbird to the app-specific one and confirmed that both ends accept cookies. The SMTP server is mail.gmx.com, port 465. Connection security is SST/TLS. The IMAP email is IMAP.gmx.com. The problem is that Thunderbird does not change Authentication Method to OAuth2. When it queries GMX it always times out or is refused. What am I missing or needs to be changed?
